title: Display Google Sheet Graph on Dashboard
excerpt: My use case is to display a google sheet graph on a dashboard. I’ve checked with Monday.com Support and the bottom line is that this capability does not exist. I’ve tried using the embed everything widget. It allows me t…

posts.author: markloring (Mark)
posts.cookedHtml: My use case is to display a google sheet graph on a dashboard. I’ve checked with Monday.com Support and the bottom line is that this capability does not exist. I’ve tried using the embed everything widget. It allows me to display the entire google workbook and all sheets, but I’m unable to use the google publish feature with either a Link, which displays correctly standalone as a URL in a browser (eg Chrome), or the embed link. Neither of these publish links work when used in the embed everything widget. Unless there is another widget that satisfies this use case, I submit this request as it is critical in our uses to be able to publish and show more complex graphs on a dashboard than Monday.com allows as part of the natural features of Monday.com. It should not require a third-party app. Thank you.

posts.author: Iryna_Belaya (Iryna Belaya)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @markloring ,

If you’re open to using apps, you might want to try Smart Spreadsheet.

It includes a widget for the dashboard hub that lets you import connected boards into a spreadsheet-style view and build the charts you need. The data stays two-way synced, so any changes on the board are automatically reflected in the widget — and vice versa.
